findings.description: PascalCase framework utility classes MaskingMapValueEditor and MapValueEditor appear in the source's CustomDataItem implementation example and are described as "フレームワークが提供するMap編集用のユーティリティ", but are absent from s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: private MapValueEditor mapValueEditor = new MaskingMapValueEditor(MASKING_CHAR, MASKING_PATTERNS); // フレームワークが提供するMap編集用のユーティリティ。

findings.description: Five property names present in the s4 properties table are missing from hints: failureLogFormatter.language, failureLogFormatter.contactFilePath, failureLogFormatter.fwFailureCodeFilePath, failureLogFormatter.defaultFailureCode, failureLogFormatter.defaultMessage.
findings.source_evidence: Source properties table lists: failureLogFormatter.className, failureLogFormatter.defaultFailureCode, failureLogFormatter.defaultMessage, failureLogFormatter.language, failureLogFormatter.notificationTargets, failureLogFormatter.analysisTargets, failureLogFormatter.contactFilePath, failureLogFormatter.fwFailureCodeFilePath, failureLogFormatter.structuredMessagePrefix
